image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: An octopus has nine brains — and that's just the beginning.
Context visual: These incredible creatures can solve puzzles that stump even the smartest animals.
Escalation visual: They use tools, like coconut shells, to protect themselves or create hiding spots.
Evidence visual: Studies show octopuses can learn through observation, mimicking others to survive.
Payoff visual: With nine brains working together, their intelligence is unlike anything we know.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the mysteries of the sea? Hit that follow button for more!
